text.title: ELK Stack Architecture and Deployment Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Log volume ≥ 10 GB/day OR retention ≥ 30 days?

conclusion.verdict: Use Loki / Datadog / CloudWatch; ELK overhead unjustified.
Elastic Cloud / OpenSearch Service + managed tiers

text.example: small_volume=false → substrate=k8s → ECK on K8s. References rule deployment-tool-managed.
